text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 Saudi Arabia has summoned the Iraqi ambassador in Riyadh Safia Taleb Al Souhail over continued drone attacks originating from Iraqi territory targeting the kingdom and other Gulf states. A formal diplomatic protest note was handed over. The kingdom stressed that Iraq must act responsibly, and that Saudi Arabia will take all necessary measures to defend its security. The move marks the first Saudi acknowledgement that it has been attacked by pro‑Iranian Iraqi militias, not only by Iran itself. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 沙特阿拉伯因伊拉克境内持续向沙特及其他海湾国家发动无人机袭击，召见了伊拉克驻利雅得大使萨菲亚·塔勒布·苏海尔（Safia Taleb Al Souhail），并递交了正式外交抗议照会。沙特强调伊拉克必须采取负责任的态度，沙特将采取一切必要措施捍卫自身安全。此举标志着沙特首次承认其不仅受到伊朗本身的攻击，还受到亲伊朗伊拉克民兵的攻击。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Times : The CIA used the Israeli Pegasus spyware in a deception operation inside Iran during an attempt to rescue a downed American pilot. The pilot’s F-15E was shot down by an Iranian shoulder-fired missile. As part of the effort, the CIA allegedly used the Israeli-made software to send fake messages to Iranian leadership and IRGC operatives, claiming the missing officer had already been located. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《泰晤士报》：中情局（CIA）在试图营救一名被击落的美国飞行员期间，在伊朗境内利用以色列的“飞马”（Pegasus）间谍软件进行了一次欺骗行动。该飞行员驾驶的F-15E战机被伊朗肩扛式导弹击落。作为行动的一部分，据称中情局利用这种以色列制造的软件向伊朗领导层和伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）人员发送虚假信息，声称失踪军官已被找到。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇱🇧 The Lebanese National News Agency reported fierce clashes the Israeli military and Hezbollah in the southern town of Bint Jbeil, earlier today. The IDF has encircled the town in recent days to clear it of alleged Hezbollah members. Israeli troops…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, Defence Minister Katz and the IDF Chief of Staff Eyal Zamir held a security situation assessment inside Lebanon. @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah has fired some 20 rockets from Lebanon at northern Israel today, according to the IDF. The rockets were either intercepted or struck open areas, and there have been no reports of injuries. tweet

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s president, in a call with his Putin, says Tehran is ready for a “balanced and fair” agreement that ensures long-term peace and security. (Note: The call likely took place before President Trump’s blockade announcement.) https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043350604504846515/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗总统在与普京通话时表示，德黑兰已准备好达成一项确保长期和平与安全的“平衡且公平”的协议。（注：此次通话可能发生在特朗普总统宣布封锁之前。）https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043350604504846515/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: The Strait is critical for Japan, they get about 93% of their oil through it. South Korea gets roughly 45%. Yet these countries haven’t really helped us. I ask them: are you going to help? We have about 45,000 U.S. troops in Japan and about 50,000 in South Korea. We guard them and protect them. But when we ask for a little help in return, they don’t help us. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：霍尔木兹海峡对日本至关重要，他们约93%的石油通过该海峡运输。韩国约占45%。然而这些国家并没有真正帮助我们。我问他们：你们打算帮忙吗？我们在日本有约45,000名美军，在韩国有约50,000名。我们守护并保护他们。但当我们要求一点回报时，他们却不帮我们。推文

text: DD Geopolitics pinned a photo
text_zh: DD Geopolitics 置顶了一张照片

text: Open Source Intel As I mentioned earlier, we may soon see Iranian regime tankers seized by the U.S. This would hit both Iran’s export flows and key buyers like China. This may actually bring Iran to the table. Time will tell. The blockade always made more sense than seizing Kharg Island. It stops Iran’s exports, its revenues, is a counterpoint to their closing the Straits. They may attack Gulf oil facilities but it puts greater pressure on Iran. It also puts great pressure on China to pressure Iran. - Dennis Ross tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：正如我之前提到的，我们可能很快会看到伊朗政权的油轮被美国扣押。这将打击伊朗的出口流以及中国等主要买家。这实际上可能会促使伊朗坐到谈判桌前。时间会证明一切。封锁总是比占领哈尔克岛（Kharg Island）更有意义。它阻止了伊朗的出口及其收入，是对他们关闭海峡的一种反制。他们可能会攻击海湾石油设施，但这会给伊朗带来更大的压力。这也给中国施加了巨大压力，迫使其向伊朗施压。——丹尼斯·罗斯（Dennis Ross）推文

They have no cards,” he added. 📌 Trump also vowed to continue actions against Iran if it does not abandon its nuclear program. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Lebanon’s National News Agency reports “fierce clashes” between the IDF and Hezbollah in Bint Jbeil. The IDF has encircled the town and is working to clear Hezbollah operatives and infrastructure. IDF is still attempting to enter and take control over remaining neighborhoods, while artillery is striking the outskirts and access points. Lebanon: In recent days, the IDF has fully encircled Bent Jbeil with hundreds of infantry and armored forces, sealing the town from all directions and preventing any movement in or out. According to IDF estimates, hundreds of Hezbollah operatives are trapped inside the Shiite stronghold, the second-largest city in the Nabatieh District. Airstrikes and ground fire are ongoing as forces tighten the perimeter and target positions within the town. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：黎巴嫩国家通讯社报道称，以色列国防军与真主党在宾特朱拜勒发生“激烈冲突”。以色列国防军已包围该镇，并正在努力清除真主党人员和基础设施。以色列国防军仍在试图进入并控制剩余街区，同时炮兵正在轰炸郊区和出入口。黎巴嫩：近几天，以色列国防军已用数百名步兵和装甲部队完全包围了宾特朱拜勒，从各个方向封锁了该镇，防止任何人员进出。据以色列国防军估计，数百名真主党人员被困在这个什叶派据点内，这是纳巴泰省第二大城市。随着部队收紧包围圈并瞄准镇内阵地，空袭和地面火力仍在持续。——开源情报 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @PolitlcsUK : 🚨 NEW: Donald Trump says the UK will send minesweepers as part of the US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz https://twitter.com/PolitlcsUK/status/2043338400678154278/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @PolitlcsUK ：🚨 最新消息：唐纳德·特朗普表示，英国将派遣扫雷舰作为美国封锁霍尔木兹海峡行动的一部分 https://twitter.com/PolitlcsUK/status/2043338400678154278/video/1 推文

text: ELINT News RT @JenGriffinFNC : Moments ago: President Trump orders US Navy to blockade the Strait of Hormuz - nothing in or out until all ships are allowed in or out of Strait without disruption. He also said the US Navy will interdict any ship that pays a toll to Iran. 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹𝗱 𝗝. 𝗧𝗿𝘂𝗺𝗽 𝗧𝗿𝘂𝘁𝗵 𝗦𝗼𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗣𝗼𝘀𝘁 𝟬𝟴:𝟱𝟮 𝗔𝗠 𝗘𝗦𝗧 𝟬𝟰.𝟭𝟮.𝟮𝟲 So, there you have it, the meeting went well, most points were agreed to, but the only point that really mattered, NUCLEAR, was not. Effective immediately, the United States Navy, the Finest in the World, will begin the process of BLOCKADING any and all Ships trying to enter, or leave, the Strait of Hormuz. At some point, we will reach an “ALL BEING ALLOWED TO GO IN, ALL BEING ALLOWED TO GO OUT” basis, but Iran has not allowed that to happen by merely saying, “There may be a mine out there somewhere,” that nobody knows about but them. THIS IS WORLD EXTORTION, and Leaders of Countries, especially the United States of America, will never be extorted. I have also instructed our Navy to seek and interdict every vessel in International Waters that has paid a toll to Iran. No one who pays an illegal toll will have safe passage on the high seas. We will also begin destroying the mines the Iranians laid in the Straits. Any Iranian who fires at us, or at peaceful vessels, will be BLOWN TO HELL! Iran knows, better than anyone, how to END this situation which has already devastated their Country. Their Navy is gone, their Air Force is gone, their Anti Aircraft and Radar are useless, Khomeini, and most of their “Leaders,” are dead, all because of their Nuclear ambition. The Blockade will begin shortly. Other Countries will be involved with this Blockade. Iran will not be allowed to profit off this Illegal Act of EXTORTION. They want money and, more importantly, they want Nuclear. Additionally and, at an appropriate moment, we are fully “LOCKED AND LOADED,” and our Military will finish up the little that is left of Iran! President DONALD J. TRUMP - Commentary Donald J. Trump Posts From Truth Social tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @JenGriffinFNC ：片刻前：特朗普总统下令美国海军封锁霍尔木兹海峡——在所有船只被允许进出海峡且不受干扰之前，任何船只不得进出。他还表示，美国海军将拦截任何向伊朗支付过路费的船只。唐纳德·J·特朗普 Truth Social 帖子 08:52 AM EST 04.12.26 所以，情况就是这样，会议进行得很顺利，大多数要点都达成了共识，但唯一真正重要的点——核问题——却没有。即刻生效，世界上最优秀的美国海军将开始封锁任何试图进出霍尔木兹海峡的船只。在某个时候，我们将达成“全部允许进入，全部允许离开”的基础，但伊朗仅仅通过说“那里可能有个没人知道的水雷”就不允许这种情况发生。这是世界勒索，各国领导人，特别是美利坚合众国的领导人，绝不会被勒索。我还指示我们的海军搜寻并拦截每一艘在国际水域向伊朗支付过路费的船只。任何支付非法过路费的人都无法在公海上安全通行。我们还将开始摧毁伊朗人在海峡中布设的水雷。任何向我们或和平船只开火的伊朗人，都将被炸入地狱！伊朗比任何人都清楚如何结束这种已经摧毁了他们国家的情况。他们的海军没了，空军没了，防空和雷达没用了，霍梅尼和他们的大多数“领导人”都死了，这一切都是因为他们的核野心。封锁即将开始。其他国家也将参与此次封锁。伊朗将不被允许从这种非法的勒索行为中获利。他们想要钱，更重要的是，他们想要核武器。此外，在适当的时候，我们已经完全“锁定并装弹”，我们的军队将彻底解决伊朗剩下的那一点点！特朗普总统 - 评论 唐纳德·J·特朗普来自Truth Social的帖子 推文

text: Open Source Intel BARTIROMO: For those people who have not been following it close, can you explain why it was critical for the US to get into Iran? Can you articulate that? TRUMP: So easy. Easiest question you've asked me so far. They can't have nuclear weapons. They have nuclear. They want to enrich more. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 巴蒂罗莫（BARTIROMO）：对于那些没有密切关注的人，你能解释一下美国进入伊朗为何至关重要吗？你能阐述一下吗？特朗普：太简单了。这是你问过我最简单的问题。他们不能拥有核武器。他们有核武器。他们想进一步浓缩。推文

text: ELINT News RT @manniefabian : Lebanon's official news agency reports "fierce clashes" between the Israeli military and Hezbollah in the southern town of Bint Jbeil. In recent days, the IDF encircled Bint Jbeil as it works to clear the Hezbollah stronghold of terror operatives and the group's infrastructure. The National News Agency reports that Israeli troops "are still trying to infiltrate and take control of the remaining neighborhoods in the city of Bint Jbeil." The report adds that the IDF shelled the outskirts of the town and its entrances with artillery. tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @manniefabian ：黎巴嫩官方通讯社报道称，以色列军队与真主党在南部城镇宾特朱拜勒发生“激烈冲突”。近几天，以色列国防军包围了宾特朱拜勒，致力于清除这个真主党恐怖据点的人员和组织基础设施。国家通讯社报道称，以色列军队“仍在试图渗透并控制宾特朱拜勒市剩余的街区”。报道补充说，以色列国防军用炮兵轰炸了该镇的郊区及其入口。推文

When I read the Fake News talking about how 'well' Iran's doing, they're not doing well at all, they're getting killed. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043346954919231635/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：他们有一天向我们发射了101枚导弹。所有101枚都被轻松击落。我们拥有世界上最强大的军队，每个人都看到了。当我读到那些谈论伊朗“表现如何好”的假新闻时，他们根本表现不好，他们正在被消灭。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043346954919231635/video/1 推文

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区的谢莫纳城（Kiryat Shmona）及周边地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Tehran's Judiciary: Assets of Iran International General Manager Seized 34 valuable assets belonging to Mahmoud Enayat , General Manager of the Mossad-linked propaganda news network Iran International. The seized properties include plots of land, several farms, houses, apartments, garden plots, one factory, and more. These were identified through precise intelligence monitoring and blocked under laws against espionage and cooperation with the Zionist regime and hostile countries.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 德黑兰司法部门：伊朗国际电视台（Iran International）总经理资产被查封。属于与摩萨德有关联的宣传新闻网络“伊朗国际”总经理马哈茂德·埃纳亚特（Mahmoud Enayat）的34项贵重资产被查封。被查封的财产包括土地、几处农场、房屋、公寓、花园地块、一家工厂等。这些资产是通过精确的情报监控确定的，并根据反间谍和与犹太复国主义政权及敌对国家合作的法律进行了冻结。

text: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Hezbollah releases footage of a strike drone targeting Israeli occupation soldiers positioned in the town of Taybeh, southern Lebanon.
text_zh: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 真主党发布了一段打击无人机瞄准黎巴嫩南部塔耶贝（Taybeh）镇以色列占领军士兵的视频。

text: 🇮🇷 IRGC Navy in first reaction to Trump's statements following collapse of Islamabad talks: "Any wrong step in the Strait of Hormuz will put the enemy in deadly whirlpools." An American destroyer left the Strait after receiving a warning from the Iranian Navy. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊斯兰革命卫队海军对特朗普在伊斯兰堡会谈破裂后的声明做出首次反应：“在霍尔木兹海峡采取任何错误步骤，都将使敌人陷入致命的漩涡。”一艘美国驱逐舰在收到伊朗海军警告后离开了海峡。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The occupation is broadcasting footage of ongoing clashes with Hezbollah fighters in Bint Jbeil, southern Lebanon.
text_zh: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 占领军正在播放与黎巴嫩南部宾特朱拜勒真主党武装人员持续冲突的画面。

text: Nuno Felix Genius you moron…. genius…. As I’ve said since January, this has been an obvious option. And preferred (in my view) to putting a landing force at risk. If the rumpers want to respond kinetically, we are locked and loaded. - Richard Goldberg tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 天才，你这个白痴……天才……正如我从一月份所说的那样，这是一个显而易见的选项。而且（在我看来）比让登陆部队冒险更可取。如果那些特朗普支持者想要进行动力学回应，我们已经锁定并装弹了。——理查德·戈德堡（Richard Goldberg）推文

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ $1.5 Trillion for Bombs while America’s needs go unmet
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 1.5万亿美元用于制造炸弹，而美国的需求却得不到满足

text: 🇮🇷 A source close to the negotiation team: The interview attributed to Araghchi, the Foreign Minister, about the negotiations, which has been circulating since this morning on some Persian and English social networks, is completely fabricated and he has not given any interview to the media.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 一位接近谈判团队的消息人士：今天早上在一些波斯语和英语社交网络上流传的关于谈判的、归因于外交部长阿拉格希（Araghchi）的采访完全是捏造的，他没有接受任何媒体采访。

text: 🌍 Join the Global Voice Network 🌍 A worldwide community of Telegram channels bringing you verified news in multiple languages. ✨ What we offer: 🔴 Breaking News – Instant updates from across the globe 🔴 Geopolitics – Deep coverage of world regions & developments 🔴 Analysis & Insight – Political, military, and strategic perspectives 🔴 Multilingual Access – News and discussions in Arabic, English, Persian, Spanish & more 📢 Because the world speaks many voices – and we bring them together. 🔈 Stay informed, stay connected, stay global: Join Here
text_zh: 🌍 加入全球之声网络 🌍 一个全球性的Telegram频道社区，为您提供多种语言的核实新闻。 ✨ 我们提供： 🔴 突发新闻 – 来自全球的即时更新 🔴 地缘政治 – 对世界地区和发展的深度报道 🔴 分析与洞察 – 政治、军事和战略视角 🔴 多语言访问 – 阿拉伯语、英语、波斯语、西班牙语等语言的新闻和讨论 📢 因为世界有许多声音——我们将它们汇聚在一起。 🔈 保持知情，保持联系，保持全球化：点击此处加入

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 The high-ranking delegation of the Islamic Republic of Iran, left Islamabad a few hours ago heading to Iran.
text_zh: 🔄 转发自ResistanceTrench镜像：🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗伊斯兰共和国高级代表团几小时前离开伊斯兰堡，前往伊朗。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 "Look at the Israeli relationship, look at the incredible partnership we have. As Bibi Netanyahu said, we’re the big brother and Israel is the little brother." - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 “看看以色列的关系，看看我们拥有的令人难以置信的伙伴关系。正如比比·内塔尼亚胡所说，我们是大哥，以色列是小弟。”——特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: We can cut off their electricity for 10 years.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们可以切断他们的电力10年。

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "‘I could take out Iran in one day. One hour.’" فَقَالَ أَنَا رَبُّكُمُ الْأَعْلَىٰ (24) فَأَخَذَهُ اللَّهُ نَكَالَ الْآخِرَةِ وَالْأُولَىٰ (25) إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبْرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰ (26) أَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ السَّمَاءُ ۚ بَنَاهَا (27) رَفَعَ سَمْكَهَا فَسَوَّاهَا (28) وَأَغْطَشَ لَيْلَهَا وَأَخْرَجَ ضُحَاهَا (29) وَالْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ دَحَاهَا (30) أَخْرَجَ مِنْهَا مَاءَهَا وَمَرْعَاهَا (31) وَالْجِبَالَ أَرْسَاهَا (32) مَتَاعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَامِكُمْ
text_zh: ↩️ 回复黎巴嫩新闻与更新：“‘我可以在一天之内消灭伊朗。一小时。’” (古兰经文引用：他说：“我是你们的主，是至尊的。” 于是，真主惩治了他，使他受后世和今世的刑罚。对于畏惧者，此中确有一种教训。你们是被造得更难呢？还是天被造得更难呢？真主曾建造了天，他升起天的穹窿，并使它均衡，他使夜间黑暗，并使白昼光明。此后，他铺平大地，他从大地中引出水来，生出牧草，并安置山岳，作为你们和你们的牲畜的享受。)

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 The high-ranking delegation of the Islamic Republic of Iran, left Islamabad a few hours ago heading to Iran.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗伊斯兰共和国高级代表团几小时前离开伊斯兰堡，前往伊朗。

text: Trump: We can cut off their electricity for 10 years.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们可以切断他们的电力10年。

text: 🇺🇸 "NATO is shameful" - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “北约是可耻的”——特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇪🇺 U.S. President Trump called NATO “shameful”, saying allies were not there for the United States during the war with Iran. He singled out UK Prime Minister Starmer for saying Britain would send equipment after the war: “That’s a Neville Chamberlain…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said the US has “wiped out their whole country, essentially”, adding that the only remaining targets in Iran are water desalination plants, electric generating plants, bridges and some missile manufacturing facilities. “We could hit them. We could have them all down. You couldn’t have electricity for ten years,” he said. “When you talk about maximum, I think I pretty much maxed out.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇪🇺 美国总统特朗普称北约‘可耻’，称盟友在与伊朗的战争期间没有支持美国。他特别点名英国首相斯塔默，因为他表示英国将在战后派遣装备：‘那是内维尔·张伯伦式的……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，美国已经“基本上消灭了他们的整个国家”，并补充说伊朗境内仅存的目标是海水淡化厂、发电厂、桥梁和一些导弹制造设施。“我们可以打击他们。我们可以把他们全部摧毁。你们十年都用不上电，”他说。“当谈到最大程度时，我想我已经基本上做到了极致。” @wfwitness

text: Maria Bartiromo: Do you believe the price of oil and gas will be lower before the midterm elections? Trump: It could be the same or a little bit higher; it should be around the same.
text_zh: 玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫（Maria Bartiromo）：你认为石油和天然气的价格会在中期选举前降低吗？特朗普：可能会持平或稍微高一点；应该差不多。

text: 🇺🇸 "I hear news reports about China giving the shoulder missiles. I doubt they would do that because I have a relationship and I think they wouldn't do that, but maybe they did a little bit at the beginning, but I don't think they would anymore. But if we catch them doing that they get a 50% tariff." - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “我听到新闻报道说中国提供了肩扛式导弹。我怀疑他们会这样做，因为我有这种关系，我认为他们不会这样做，但也许他们在开始时做了一点，但我认为他们不会再这样做了。但如果我们抓到他们这样做，他们将面临50%的关税。”——特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump on NATO: We have to reexamine NATO. They weren't there for us. They won't be there for us. This is just a military operation, not a hard thing for us.
text_zh: 特朗普谈北约：我们必须重新审视北约。他们没有支持我们。他们也不会支持我们。这只是一次军事行动，对我们来说不是什么难事。

text: Trump compares Keir Starmer to Neville Chamberlain.
text_zh: 特朗普将基尔·斯塔默（Keir Starmer）比作内维尔·张伯伦（Neville Chamberlain）。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪 U.S. President Trump said he rebuilt the US military in his first term and is now using it in his second term. “We have the greatest military anywhere in the world. We have the greatest equipment in the world.” He also noted that Venezuela is making…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 U.S. President Trump called NATO “shameful”, saying allies were not there for the United States during the war with Iran. He singled out UK Prime Minister Starmer for saying Britain would send equipment after the war: “That’s a Neville Chamberlain type of statement.” He also criticised Germany for saying it didn’t start the war. “Now we have to reexamine NATO because they weren’t there for us,” Trump said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇻🇪 美国总统特朗普表示，他在第一个任期内重建了美国军队，现在正在第二个任期内使用它。‘我们拥有世界上最伟大的军队。我们拥有世界上最伟大的装备。’他还指出，委内瑞拉正在……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 美国总统特朗普称北约‘可耻’，称盟友在与伊朗的战争期间没有支持美国。他特别点名英国首相斯塔默，因为他表示英国将在战后派遣装备：‘那是内维尔·张伯伦式的声明。’他还批评德国说它没有发动战争。‘现在我们必须重新审视北约，因为他们没有支持我们，’特朗普说。 @wfwitness

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 President Trump: ‘I could take out Iran in one day. One hour.’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 特朗普总统：‘我可以在一天之内消灭伊朗。一小时。’ @Middle_East_Spectator

text: Trump: Chinese cars are destroying Europe because they are taking away business from Mercedes and BMW. We don’t have any Chinese cars in our country.
text_zh: 特朗普：中国汽车正在摧毁欧洲，因为它们抢走了梅赛德斯和宝马的生意。我们国家没有任何中国汽车。
